reviews.review_title: I may be biased, but I love this game
reviews.review_description: I've put hundreds of hours into Grenade Junky. There's no other game like it. The fast-paced action and destruction are immensely satisfying. I also like all the explosion puns.

This game uses a movement system that I havent seen in any other vr games and that's something I like to see!
The game has a cohesive story and satisfying mechanics. The soundtrack also has some bangers in it! The story is fairly short for a single player title and can be a little buggy at times, but the core of the game is very entertaining and is an impressive new game for this dev team.

This is the kind of shooter I enjoy, just going insane and blowing **** up!! This is so much fun,.

The graphics are a bit glitchy and the game doesn't run as smoothly as I would like, but the insane action makes up for it.

The voice acting is good as well, unfortunately when you hear the aliens, it doesn't help in locating where they are, they could be anywhere. Usually in games, when you hear the enemy, the sound helps you to know if they're behind you, or to the left. Not in this game, which is a shame.

I would also like some vibrate in the controllers when I fire the gun. Just feels better that way.

Also, it doesn't say my name in the leaderboard, it just adds a date.

Even with its flaws, this is still an extremely fun game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review, We are super happy to hear you are enjoying our game! You feedback has also been documented for any protentional updates! Cheers
~CMP
